requirement_topic.en: ICASA Type Approval — Radio and Telecommunications Terminal Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: ICASA型式批准——无线电及电信终端设备
requirement_topic.zht: ICASA型式批准——無線電及電信終端設備

summary.en: All radio transmitters and telecommunications terminal equipment must obtain ICASA type approval before importation or sale in South Africa, under the Electronic Communications Act No. 36 of 2005 and associated regulations. The ICASA approval number must appear on the product and its packaging. CE marking and FCC authorisation are not recognised as equivalents.
summary.zh: 所有无线电发射机及电信终端设备须依据《电子通信法》第36号（2005年）及相关法规，在进口或于南非销售前取得ICASA型式批准。ICASA批准编号须标注于产品及包装上。CE标志和FCC授权不被视为等同认可。
summary.zht: 所有無線電發射機及電信終端設備須依據《電子通訊法》第36號（2005年）及相關法規，在進口或於南非銷售前取得ICASA型式批准。ICASA批准編號須標注於產品及包裝上。CE標誌和FCC授權不被視為等同認可。

standards_or_laws: Electronic Communications Act No. 36 of 2005 (South Africa)

summary.en: China SRRC radio type approval (MIIT) for radio frequency equipment, plus MIIT network access licence (NAL) for telecommunications terminal equipment. GB standards (e.g. GB 15844, GB 8702) apply domestically. SRRC and NAL approvals are China-domestic only and are not recognised by ICASA.
summary.zh: 中国SRRC无线电型式批准（工信部）适用于射频设备，以及工信部电信终端设备进网许可证（NAL）。GB标准（如GB 15844、GB 8702）在境内适用。SRRC和NAL批准仅限于中国境内，不被ICASA承认。
summary.zht: 中國SRRC無線電型式批准（工信部）適用於射頻設備，以及工信部電信終端設備進網許可證（NAL）。GB標準（如GB 15844、GB 8702）在境內適用。SRRC和NAL批准僅限於中國境內，不被ICASA承認。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) — Telecommunications Terminal Equipment (China)

gap.en: Mandatory separate ICASA type approval required; CE and FCC authorisations are not accepted. SRRC and NAL approvals have no legal standing in South Africa. ICASA approval number must appear on product label and packaging.
gap.zh: 须另行取得强制性ICASA型式批准；CE和FCC授权不被接受。SRRC和NAL批准在南非不具法律效力。ICASA批准编号须标注于产品标签及包装上。
gap.zht: 須另行取得強制性ICASA型式批准；CE和FCC授權不被接受。SRRC和NAL批准在南非不具法律效力。ICASA批准編號須標注於產品標籤及包裝上。

source.publisher: ICASA — Independent Communications Authority of South Africa

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ICASA type approval is mandatory for all radio and telecom terminal equipment sold or imported into South Africa. Chinese SRRC and NAL approvals are not recognised. A separate ICASA approval process must be completed and the ICASA number displayed on the product.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] ICASA型式批准对于所有在南非销售或进口的无线电及电信终端设备均属强制要求。中国SRRC和NAL批准不被承认。须完成独立的ICASA批准程序，并在产品上显示ICASA批准编号。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] ICASA型式批准對於所有在南非銷售或進口的無線電及電信終端設備均屬強制要求。中國SRRC和NAL批准不被承認。須完成獨立的ICASA批准程序，並在產品上顯示ICASA批准編號。
